events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition and defect cues. Scenario: commercial construction, traps & venting, observed field condition: flat/horizontal vent below flood rim. Work rough-complete. Reference IPC/UPC. Need determine decision fail because non-compliant. Need fill fields.

We need reason: flat/horizontal vent below flood rim. In plumbing, vents must be installed vertical or with required slope to drain back to soil/drain pipe, and must terminate above flood rim of fixtures served to prevent backflow/backup into vent system. A horizontal vent below flood rim is non-compliant. Component condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Risk high? Could cause sewage backup, cross-connection, health hazard. Decision fail. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound source irrelevant. Confidence 0.95. Event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. Findings: vent installed horizontally below flood rim; lacks required vertical rise to above flood rim; potential for drain backup into vent system. Actions: remove/reconfigure vent to rise vertically to at least 6 inches above flood rim before offset; ensure proper slope for drainage back; re-inspect. Rationale: IPC/UPC require vents to terminate above flood rim and be installed to prevent siphonage/backpressure; horizontal vent below flood rim violates. References: IPC 2018/2021 Section 903 (Vent Termination), 906 (Vent Connection), UPC maybe 901.2 etc. Need not quote mechanically.

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

    "Vent is installed flat/horizontal below the flood rim of the served fixture",
    "Vent does not rise vertically above the flood rim before any horizontal offset",
    "Configuration creates a path for wastewater backup into the vent system and potential cross-connection/siphonage"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove or reconfigure the vent so it rises vertically to at least 6 inches above the flood rim before running horizontal",
    "Ensure the vent is graded to drain condensate and debris back to the drainage system",
    "Re-inspect and obtain third-party approval before closing in the work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Plumbing vents must terminate above the flood rim of fixtures served and be arranged to prevent drain backup and protect the trap seal. A flat/horizontal vent located below the flood rim violates these requirements and poses a health/safety hazard.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 903 - Vent Terminals",
    "IPC Section 906 - Vent Connection",
    "UPC Chapter 9 - Vents"
  ]
}
